templateSql: id, user_id, order_no, amount, status, created_at
id, order_id, carrier, tracking_no, status, shipped_at

<if test="name != null">name = #{name},</if>
        <if test="email != null">email = #{email},</if>
        <if test="status != null">status = #{status},</if>

<if test="status != null">
            AND status = #{status}
        </if>
        <if test="dept != null">
            AND department = #{dept}
        </if>
        <if test="namePattern != null">
            AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')
        </if>

<if test="cols != null and cols.size() > 0">
            <foreach collection="cols" item="col" separator=", ">
                ${col}
            </foreach>
        </if>
        <if test="cols == null or cols.size() == 0">
            id, name, email
        </if>

<choose>
            <when test="filter == 'active'">
                WHERE status = 'active'
            </when>
            <when test="filter == 'pending'">
                WHERE status = 'pending'
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                WHERE 1=1
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at
id, order_no, amount, status as order_status, created_at as order_date

<if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
            AND u.department_id IN
            <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                #{did}
            </foreach>
        </if>

CASE
            <when test="type == 'full'">id, name, email, status, department, created_at, updated_at</when>
            <when test="type == 'basic'">id, name, email</when>
            <when test="type == 'status'">id, name, status</when>
            <otherwise>id, name</otherwise>
        END

<if test="user != null">
            <if test="user.name != null">
                name = #{user.name},
            </if>
            <if test="user.email != null">
                email = #{user.email},
            </if>
        </if>
        <if test="status != null">
            <choose>
                <when test="status == 'active'">
                    status = 'active',
                </when>
                <when test="status == 'inactive'">
                    status = 'inactive',
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    status = #{status},
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </if>
id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at
id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at
